title: Vingegaard Made the Giro Look Easy. Now the Hard Part — Beating Pogačar at the Tour de France Again.
content:
Vingegaard proved he's back by completing the grand tour sweep. Here's why chasing the Giro-Tour double could be the Dane's smartest move yet.

Read the full article at Vingegaard Made the Giro Look Easy. Now the Hard Part — Beating Pogačar at the Tour de France Again. on Velo.
author: ahood
